### VTable overwrite with gadget

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width=35%}

```cpp
class Bar {
  char buffer[100];
  Foo *foo;
  int x, y;
  ...
};

void Bar::vulnerable() {
  gets(buffer);
  foo->some_method(x, y);
  // (*foo->vtable[K])(
  //     foo, x, y
  // )
  // foo == rdi
  // x == rsi
  // y == rdx
}
```

::::

:::: {.column}

::: {.r-stack}

![](/rop/texfig/vtable-overwrite-diag.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-out fragment-index=2 height=450px}

![](/rop/texfig/vtable-overwrite-diag.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 height=400px}

![](/rop/texfig/vtable-overwrite-diag.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3 height=400px}

![](/rop/texfig/vtable-overwrite-diag.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4 height=400px}

:::

::::

:::::
